name: Chow Mein Pnnn10b
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork - cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a hot deep skillet or wok, brown the pork in 1 tsp oil.
2. Remove the pork from the pan and add 1 tsp oil to the pan.
3. Cook the celery and onion until crisp tender.
4. Add the mushrooms to the pan.
5. Blend the cornstarch into the water until smooth. Stir in the chicken broth and soy sauce.
6. Return the meat to the pan with the vegetables.
7. Add bean sprouts and water chestnuts.
8. Pour the sauce over everything and heat through.
9. Serve over chow mein noodles with steamed rice on the side.
Note: To reduce sodium, rinse all canned vegetables well. You can add chopped green peppers, fresh mushrooms, and thinly sliced cabbage when stir-frying the vegetables. Chicken or beef can be used instead of pork if desired.
